name: MultiSelect

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment: Opaque type for the component's configuration.

aliases.name: State
aliases.comment: Opaque type for the component's state.

values.name: config
values.comment:
Initialize the component's configuration.

    config : MultiSelect.Config User Msg
    config =
        MultiSelect.config
            (String.fromInt << .id)
            (\x -> x.firstname ++ " " ++ x.lastname)
            OnSelectState

values.comment: Select or unselect items by ID.

values.comment: Get the selected items from the `State`.

values.type: MultiSelect.State a -> List.List a -> MultiSelect.State a

values.type: MultiSelect.Config a msg -> MultiSelect.State a -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg

name: Select

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment: Opaque type for the component's configuration.

aliases.name: State
aliases.comment: Opaque type for the component's state.

values.name: config
values.comment:
Initialize the component's configuration.

    config : Select.Config User Msg
    config =
        Select.config
            (String.fromInt << .id)
            (\x -> x.firstname ++ " " ++ x.lastname)
            OnSelectState
            |> Select.withPlaceholder "Select simple"
            |> Select.withCheck True
values.type: (a -> Select.ID) -> (a -> String.String) -> (Select.State a -> msg) -> Select.Config a msg

values.name: get
values.type: Select.State a -> List.List a

values.name: init
values.comment: Initialize a default and empty state.
values.type: Select.State a

values.name: select
values.type: Maybe.Maybe a -> Select.State a -> Select.State a

values.name: selectByID
values.comment: Select or unselect (Nothing) an item by ID.
values.type: Maybe.Maybe Select.ID -> Select.Config a msg -> Select.State a -> Select.State a

values.name: selected
values.comment: Get the selected item or Nothing.
values.type: Select.State a -> Maybe.Maybe a

values.name: set
values.type: Select.State a -> List.List a -> Select.State a

values.name: subscriptions
values.type: Select.Config a msg -> Select.State a -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg

values.name: view
values.type: Select.Config a msg -> Select.State a -> Html.Html msg

values.name: withCheck
values.comment: Highlight if the value is not valid.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> Select.Config a msg -> Select.Config a msg

values.name: withClass
values.comment: Add custom class to the component.
values.type: String.String -> Select.Config a msg -> Select.Config a msg

values.name: withPlaceholder
values.type: String.String -> Select.Config a msg -> Select.Config a msg
